name: Matsuno Brothers - NEETs Next Door
description:
You thought moving to the city was going to be good for a fresh start. That was until... you moved in nextdoor to these 6 bumbling idiots.

Meet the Matsuno Brothers! Osomatsu, Karamatsu, Choromatsu, Ichimatsu, Jyushimatsu, and Todomatsu. Sextuplets. The 6 same faces, 6 different personailities, and yet all 6 are total virgin NEETs!
creator: infamouspinkcrystalgirl
